executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: 3 live error jobs persist; architecture verifier correct-fail-closed; escalations at 90-218 repeats without effective repair closure.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Diagnose and repair competitor-analysis ENOSPC root cause (system has 250G free — not a global disk issue); verify blocked-channel-recovery self-recovery on next run; internal-linking-watchdog delivery config repaired this run — will clear on next Wed execution.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

error_job_details.name: competitor-analysis
error_job_details.last_error: Error: ENOSPC: no space left on device, write
error_job_details.note: System has 250G free on /, 28G free on /tmp. ENOSPC at 845ms indicates a write to an invalid/missing target path or tempfs limit in the cron sandbox, not global disk exhaustion.

error_job_details.name: blocked-channel-recovery
error_job_details.last_error: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart
error_job_details.note: Gateway-restart interruption — expected to self-recover on next scheduled run (Tue/Thu 10:30).

error_job_details.name: internal-linking-watchdog
error_job_details.note: DELIVERY CONFIG REPAIRED THIS RUN. Changed delivery from channel:last (resolving to Matrix without target) to mode:none. Status will clear on next Wed 03:00 execution.

findings.title: 3 live cron error jobs — 1 repaired this run, 2 still require action
findings.mechanism: competitor-analysis (ENOSPC at 845ms — not global disk), blocked-channel-recovery (gateway restart — self-recovering), internal-linking-watchdog (matrix delivery target — CONFIG REPAIRED THIS RUN).
findings.root_cause: Three independent failure modes. competitor-analysis ENOSPC at extremely short runtime (845ms) with 250G free disk suggests a write to an invalid path or sandbox tempfs limit. blocked-channel-recovery was interrupted by gateway restart and should self-recover. internal-linking-watchdog had stale Matrix delivery config without a target — now set to mode:none.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair competitor-analysis ENOSPC root cause (script-level path/tempfs investigation needed). Monitor blocked-channel-recovery self-recovery. internal-linking-watchdog config fix applied — verify on next Wed run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier fail-closed is correct — reflects real live errors
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_verifier.py returns fail because independent verifier is fail. Independent verifier is fail because 3 live error jobs exist + marketing evidence is stale. This is a truthful reflection, not a broken loop.
findings.root_cause: The verifier chain is working as designed — it correctly fails when live errors exist. The fail state will clear only when the error jobs are actually repaired.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix the remaining 2 actionable error jobs (competitor-analysis, blocked-channel-recovery). internal-linking-watchdog already repaired.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification stale (4000+ min) and fail
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json last checked 2026-06-02, verdict fail. Marketing owner loop has not produced fresh independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
findings.root_cause: Primary-repo adoption evidence remains flat. Marketing loop has not produced a fresh independent verification with measurable movement since June 2.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh outcome evidence with measurable primary-repo movement, then rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: 3 critical escalations at 90-218 repeats without effective repair closure
findings.mechanism: competitor-analysis escalation (90 repeats), architecture-verifier escalation (142 repeats), architecture-verifier-runtime escalation (218 repeats). Health monitor auto-repair attempts failed on verifier issues.
findings.root_cause: Escalation → watchdog → repair path is not producing effective repairs for architecture-verifier-runtime (218 repeats). The escalation path may need restructuring.
findings.recommended_fix: Root-cause fix of competitor-analysis ENOSPC will clear one escalation. Architecture-verifier escalations will clear once error jobs are fixed and independent verification passes. Consider restructuring the escalation→repair pathway for the architecture verifier runtime.

findings.title: Loop integrity checks pass for both covered loops
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_latest.json reports ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog both status=ok with no topology/ownership drift.
findings.root_cause: Loop integrity framework is functioning correctly.

findings.title: Architecture checker passes — structural coherence intact
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_checker.py returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Checks structural coherence, not live runtime state.
findings.root_cause: Checker is designed to validate structural contracts (loop definitions, tool rules, ownership boundaries), not live runtime health. It correctly reports structural soundness.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Diagnose and repair competitor-analysis ENOSPC root cause
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: System has 250G free disk. 845ms runtime + ENOSPC indicates a script-level write path failure (invalid directory, sandbox tempfs exhaustion, or missing mount). This is the most actionable remaining error job.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears 1 of 3 live error jobs and stops the 90-repeat escalation.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Verify blocked-channel-recovery self-recovers on next scheduled run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Error was gateway restart interruption. Should self-recover on next Tue 10:30 run.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears 1 of 3 live error jobs if self-recovery succeeds.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Verify internal-linking-watchdog passes on next Wed run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Delivery config repaired this run (mode:none). Status will clear when job executes successfully.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the third live error job.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun full architecture verification chain after all error jobs clear
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture verifier and independent verifier correctly fail-closed while errors exist. Only actual repair will clear them.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears architecture-signoff escalations and closes the verifier fail loop.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh independent verification pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing independent verification is 4000+ min stale and fail. Blocks overall architecture green state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the cross-loop blocker from architecture verification.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Changed delivery from channel:last (resolving to Matrix without target, causing 'Delivering to Matrix requires target <room|alias|user>' error) to mode:none. Job will execute without delivery attempt on next Wed run.
Ran health_monitor.py fresh — captured 7-issue state with escalations at 90/142/218 repeats.
Re-ran all three: checker=AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, verifier=fail (correct), independent_verifier=fail (correct).
250G free on /, 28G free on /tmp, 49Gi available memory. ENOSPC is confirmed not a global disk exhaustion issue.
Both covered loops (ralph-docs-watchdog, agent-architecture-watchdog) pass with no topology/ownership drift.

errors: 3 live error jobs (1 repaired this run, 2 still pending)
architecture verifier fail-closed on live errors (correct)
marketing independent verification stale (4000+ min) and fail
independent_verification.summary: Independent verification found architecture blockers that prevent a healthy verifier pass.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh architecture independent verification against the refreshed live topology.
Fresh architecture independent verification after all error jobs cleared and verifier chain passes.
Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: competitor-analysis ENOSPC at 845ms — 90 escalation repeats — architecture-verifier-runtime escalation at 218 repeats
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: competitor-analysis crashes instantly (845ms) with ENOSPC despite 250G free disk — root cause unknown and needs script-level diagnosis. The architecture-verifier-runtime escalation at 218 repeats without effective repair is a process failure in the escalation→repair chain. Combined, these are the highest-risk unresolved issues.

notes: internal-linking-watchdog delivery config repaired this run — mode:none replaces broken Matrix channel:last. Will clear on next Wed execution.
competitor-analysis ENOSPC at 845ms with 250G free disk is NOT a global disk issue — needs script-level write-path investigation.
blocked-channel-recovery interrupted by gateway restart — expected to self-recover on next Tue/Thu run.
Architecture verifier fail-closed is correct behavior — it reflects real live errors, not a broken loop.
Architecture checker passes (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK) because it checks structural coherence, not live runtime state.
Marketing independent verification 4000+ min stale — marketing loop has not produced fresh evidence since June 2.
Loop integrity correctly identifies both covered loops as OK at the topology level.
Architecture-verifier-runtime escalation at 218 repeats without effective repair — escalation→repair path needs review.
